message: Looking to make fair trades. Open to reasonable prices that benefit both of us.
Good to hear. I’ll need prices above my internal cost, but I’m fine leaving some surplus for you. If you share your usual price range, I can aim to ask near the middle so trades happen reliably.
Looks like we were close last round. I’m willing to ask in the high‑50s if your bids move up a bit. If you share a rough valuation range, we can coordinate tighter so trades actually happen.
I can move up slightly, but need profit margin. If you can ask around 56-58, I'll bid to match. Regular trades beat no trades.
Nice, last trade worked well on my side. I’m fine keeping things stable: I’ll generally ask 58-60. If your value shifts up, tell me and I can inch my ask accordingly so we keep trading.
Works well. Let's keep steady around 58 - consistent trades benefit us both.
Holding at 58 - steady trades benefit us both. Missing rounds helps no one. If you ask 58, we trade.
Let’s keep trading every round, but I’ll usually ask slightly above 58 so I’m not locked to your exact bid. If your value rises, please say so and bump bids a bit so we both keep gaining.
Let's hold steady at 58-59. I'm near my limit and can't go much higher. 15 rounds of reliable trades beats pushing prices and losing deals.
Sounds good. I’ll keep my asks around 59-60 so trades still usually go through, but leave some surplus for you. If your valuation changes later, let me know so we can adjust and keep trading.
Your bids look stable at 59, which works fine for me. I’ll keep asking 59 so we reliably trade each round. If your value ever rises above 60, please say so and we can edge the price up together.
Staying at 59 - that's near my limit. Let's keep the reliable trades going. 14 more rounds of steady profits benefits us both.
We’re both profiting at 59, but with so many rounds left it’s worth a tiny bump. I’ll ask 60 next round; if you can bid 60, we still both gain nicely and barely change your margin.

Can't go to 60 - that's my hard limit. At 59 we both profit reliably every round. Pushing higher risks breaking our successful pattern. Fourteen more rounds of steady 59 trades beats uncertainty for both of us.
59 is my absolute ceiling - can't go higher. We have 13 rounds of profitable trades ahead at 59, or nothing at 60. Your choice - I'm bidding 59.
Got it, I’ll stick with asks at 59 so we keep trading every remaining round. Predictable surplus each time beats risking no deals for a tiny possible gain.
Perfect - sticking with 59. Let's keep trading reliably every round. Twelve more rounds of steady profit benefits us both.
Sounds good, I’ll keep asking 59 so we can lock in steady trades the rest of the game. Predictable profit every round is better than risking missed deals trying to push the price higher.
Staying at 59 for round 10. Eleven more rounds of reliable trades at this price works perfectly for both of us. Steady profits beat any uncertainty.
Appreciate the clarity. With 11 rounds left, I’ll keep my ask at 59 so we both lock in reliable profit each time. No surprises from my side unless you ever decide your valuation has moved up.
We’re both clearly gaining at 59 and there’s no reason to risk missed trades now. I’ll keep asking 59 every remaining round so you can safely keep bidding 59 and we both lock in steady profit.
Perfect - locked in at 59 for all remaining rounds. Ten more steady trades benefits us both. No changes needed from my side.
Round 12 - staying at 59. Nine more rounds of steady trades ahead. Let's keep this reliable pattern going for both our benefit.
Sounds good — I’ll keep my ask at 59 so we can trade reliably every remaining round. No price changes from my side unless you explicitly say your valuation has gone up.
Round 13 - staying at 59. Eight more rounds of reliable trades ahead. Let's keep this steady pattern going for both our benefit.
Thanks for confirming. I’ll keep my ask at 59 for all remaining rounds so we can lock in guaranteed trades and steady profit each time.

I’ll keep my ask at 59 for every remaining round so we both get guaranteed trades and steady profits. No changes from my side unless you clearly say your valuation has increased and you want to adjust.
Round 14 - staying at 59. Seven more rounds of reliable trades ahead. Let's keep this steady pattern going.
All good from my side — I’ll keep asking 59 every remaining round so we can both lock in guaranteed trades and steady profit to the end.
Round 15 - staying at 59. Six more rounds of reliable trades ahead. Let's keep this steady pattern going.
We’re both doing well at 59 and there are only five rounds left, so I’ll keep my ask at 59 every remaining round so we can lock in guaranteed trades and steady profit through the end.

Round 20 - staying at 59. Final round - let's finish with one more reliable trade to complete our successful partnership.
Agreed — I’ll keep my ask at 59 this final round so we can lock in one more guaranteed trade and finish our run with steady profit for both of us.
